query:
ALTER TABLE products 
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS companyName,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS companyWebsite,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS companyEmail,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS locations,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS logoUrl,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS footerNote;
